cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, this is calling from Canara Bank. Am I speaking with Samaresh Dasgupta?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Samaresh Dasgupta. How can I help you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we have detected unusual activity on your net banking account and it has been locked for security reasons.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Unusual activity? What kind of activity are you referring to, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Multiple failed login attempts from an unrecognized device, sir. To unlock it immediately, I need to verify your username and password.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hold on, you said you need my password? Isn't that against the bank's policy? Can you explain?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand your concern, but this is a standard verification step to protect your account, ma'am.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Standard verification? Usually we use DOB and last four digits of the registered mobile number, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir, but for an urgent unlock we also require the login credentials.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, let me check my records. My username is 's.dasgupta123'. Is that correct?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Perfect, now please tell me your password so we can proceed.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure, my password is '********', but before I give it, can you tell me which branch I'm talking to?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We are operating from the main branch in Bangalore, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Bangalore? I thought my account is linked to the Kolkata branch. Why Bangalore?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Because the security team is centralized, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, can you give me a reference number for this call?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Your reference number is 987654321. Please provide the password now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Before I do, could you tell me the official website link for password reset?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure, you can go to canarabank.com/unlock, but the quickest way is through this call.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hmm, that URL looks odd. Usually the bank's site is canarabank.co.in. Are you sure?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir, it's the correct link for urgent unlocks.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, I'll give the password then: mypassword123.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, sir. Your account is now unlocked.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Wait, I need to verify. Can you send me a SMS with the unlock confirmation?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure, the SMS will be sent shortly.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Actually, I'm going to hang up now. Thank you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, before you hang up, we need to complete the verification to ensure your account is safe.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I already gave you the password. Why do you need more?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 147s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
